---
title: "schizo_gan_data_cleaning"
author: "Nicholas Enbar-Salo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# schizo_gan_data_cleaning: A data cleaning script to standardize column names and diagnostic coades between datasets
```{r}
# Load libraries
library(conflicted)
library(tidyverse)

conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")

# Read in files
cobre <- read.table("/Users/nenbarsalo/Downloads/schizophrenia_project/data/raw/cobre/participants.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t")
ucla <- read.table("/Users/nenbarsalo/Downloads/schizophrenia_project/data/raw/ucla_cnp/participants.tsv", header=TRUE, sep="\t")
```

# Clean to make diagnostic codes and column names the same
```{r}
ucla_cleaned <- ucla |>
  select(id = participant_id, diagnosis = diagnosis) |>
  filter(diagnosis == "CONTROL" | diagnosis == "SCHZ")

cobre_cleaned <- cobre |>
  select(id = participant_id, diagnosis = condit) |>
  mutate(diagnosis = recode(diagnosis, 
    "SCZ"     = "SCHZ",
    "CON"     = "CONTROL",
    "CON-SIB" = "CONTROL",
    "SCZ-SIB" = "SCHZ"
  )) 
```

# Saves
```{r}
write.table(ucla_cleaned, "/Users/nenbarsalo/Downloads/schizophrenia_project/data/raw/ucla_cnp/participants_ucla_cleaned.tsv", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)
write.table(cobre_cleaned, "/Users/nenbarsalo/Downloads/schizophrenia_project/data/raw/cobre/participants_cobre_cleaned.tsv", sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, quote=FALSE)
```
